title: The Palace Fight Nears
description: Pages 16–20 focus on the palace fight nears, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.

summary: The Palace Fight Nears develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
